headline: Fix clipped mobile hero, soften awkward launch copy, and show a real route-generation loading state.
focus: Resolve the visible mobile issues: clipped hero area, unnatural translated copy, and dead-feeling itinerary generation.
notes: Reduced mobile hero/title pressure and prevented the top of cards from being clipped under the language row.
Rewrote awkward product/translation-style phrases into softer travel-service copy.
Added a visible route-generation loading overlay with friendly Korean messages.
Added a fallback generated route card so the CTA gives visible feedback even if the original generator does not respond.
